# Miles tempts Adelle and is rejected

📁 Characters: Miles (../Data/Characters/Miles%2055be668bc999441da2a96ebd11a05626.md), Adelle (../Data/Characters/Adelle%202ff1980fd10b42a7bc0f65b61a2ab3e8.md)
Status: Yes
Product: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

<aside>
💡 I don’t really like this idea now.  Maybe I’d like it more if it was before she is married?  Maybe if I made the temptation subtle and less particular?

</aside>

The main purpose of this scene is to:

1. Provide a constrast with the [Nivana and Miles](../TWOLD%20Plot/Arcs/Nivana%20and%20Miles%2050346db4f6454fcbabde34d98decbab0.md) arc.
2. Callback to the first book and show how Adelle has grown since she gave in to Damond’s temptation.
